Text.text: Sachin Singh

Label.text: Hello! I am Sachin, I am an SAP Full Stack Developer

Text.text: of progressive experience in SAP ABAP Development, SAP Fiori/UI5, OData, CDS Views, and Full-Stack Web Development. Demonstrated expertise in architecting scalable enterprise applications, optimizing performance for complex datasets, and delivering end-to-end Fiori solutions across diverse industries. Skilled in collaborating with cross-functional teams to drive digital transformation initiatives and in developing robust business applications that enhance operational efficiency and elevate user experience.
Custom ALV Reports
Enhancments (BADI, Customer/User Exits, Implicit, Explicit)
CDS Views
Adobe Forms
Background JOBS
OData Services
FIORI Apps
SAP ABAP
SAP RAP (Trained)
SAP CAP (Trained)
CDS Views
AMDP Methods
OData Services
Fluid Management Systems
Heavy Equipment Manufacturing
Real Estate/Plotted Development
Currently working with 3.5+ Years of experience in the Code&Clap Global Services PVT. LTD. as SAP Full Stack Developer.
Expertise in RICEFW concepts across functional domains which mainly includes SD, MM, FI
Excellent Debugging skills that help in resolving issue by finding the root cause
Excellent Performance Analysing skills that help in designing high performing programs
From the phase of DDD till Post Go-Live Support, profound technical knowledge played a vital role
Worked on FIORI apps from scratch to deployment-ready phase including OData Service with latest approaches
Worked on Single Page/Multi Page Fiori applications
Implemented Split App type FIORI applications
Communicating client’s business requirements by Constructing easy to understand data and process models
Implemented Custom Fiori apps with custom designs and QR Scanners involved
Implemented Warehouse TR & TO creation Procedure using FIORI Apps
Performed Serialised material transfer postings using FIORI App
Implemented Multiple QR Scans with a Single click using FIORI App, which was not available in SAPUI5 SDK

Panel.headerText: Experience Breakup: Company: Code&Clap Gobal Services PVT. LTD
Client: Sany Heavy Industry Pvt Ltd (Jan 2026 – Till date)

Text.text: Role: SAP Technical Consultant
Module: WM
Environment: SAP S/4 HANA
Material Unloading with 103 Movement Type using FIORI App
Pallet Request (105 for GRN Creation & TO Creation) using FIORI App
Pallet Confirmation (TO Confirmation) using FIORI App
Material Unpacking (TO Creation) using FIORI App
Scanning SU & BIN for (TO Confirmation) using FIORI App
New Screen for LM01 to use in RF Gun for TO Create & Confirm Automatically using FIORI App
Smartform for GRN Label Printing

Panel.headerText: Client: GSquare Realtors Pvt Ltd (April 2025 – Dec 2025)

Text.text: Role: SAP Technical Consultant
Module: MM, FICO
Environment: SAP Public Cloud
Flexible Workflow Implmentation
PO Approval Strategy Determination using BADI
BRS (Bank Reconcile Statement) Report using custom CDS Views
Custom CDS views using Key User Extensibility
FIORI Application for listing out vendor details
Adobe Form Customization based on document type
Deployed FIORI App on through BTP instance
Implemented Communication Scenario for OData access

Panel.headerText: Client: C.R.I Pumps Pvt Ltd. (May 2023 – April 2025)

Text.text: Role: SAP Technical Consultant
Module: SD, MM, FICO
Environment: SAP S/4HANA
Enhancement while creating PO
Implemented a custom program to process IDoc orders everyday
Performance improvement over Inbound IDoc dependent FM
Redesigned OO Report for old procedural report
FIORI Application for listing out vendor details
Summary and Detailed report display for Sales orders
Performance tuning to many programs

Created a custom FIORI app from scratch to provide camera scanner on screen for input of Bin. Once Bin details are fetched from scanner, OData calls will be performed based on user inputs for further proceedings.
Created custom reports for customer ageing, vendor ageing, asset ledger, customer ledger and other FI reports
FIORI application for performing outbound delivery. Implemented mass data pushing approach by utilizing JSON object pattern.
Implemented lock-object in custom FIORI app for providing consistency of data between FIORI app and SAP GUI using soft state in OData service.
Fiori List Report and Navigate to Object Page applications.
Role: SAP Technical Consultant
Module: SD, MM, FICO
Environment: SAP S/4HANA
Smart form & Adobe form changes to have QR-Code as part of GST implementation
Created custom report program to fetch huge material document data part-by-part using cursors
Adobe Forms developed to print Invoices along with the Digital Signature
Report designing using OO ALV
GRN Summary and various Programs in SAP HANA system to improve performance to run crores of records
Worked in AMS team, supported many objects and handled P1 issues

Goods Transfer Posting Fiori applications from One Bin to Another Bin, Bin to different Location, One Location to different Location, Location to Bin. Implemented Scanner for getting data of material and bins. Valid Material will be migrated with serial no’s attached to the destinations provided in input screen.

Created a custom FIORI app from scratch to provide camera scanner on screen for input of Bin. Once Bin details are fetched from scanner, OData calls will be performed based on user inputs for further proceedings.
Created custom reports for customer ageing, vendor ageing, asset ledger, customer ledger and other FI reports
FIORI application for performing outbound delivery. Implemented mass data pushing approach by utilizing JSON object pattern.
Implemented lock-object in custom FIORI app for providing consistency of data between FIORI app and SAP GUI using soft state in OData service.
Fiori List Report and Navigate to Object Page applications.
